original_snippet_context: Discussion about the legality of a newspaper contest and its comparison with practices of insurance companies.
relevant_quote: Equitativa, Sul-America e Caixa Geral das Famílias e outras
justification: The mention of "Caixa Geral das Famílias" alongside insurance companies is purely informational, part of an analogy, and doesn't express any stance on the *Caixa de Conversão* debate.
